# Bright Interaction - LLM Context File
# https://brightinteraction.com

## About
Bright Interaction is The Infrastructure Firm, providing digital sovereignty solutions with secure, self-hosted infrastructure, workflow automation, and multi-layered security for businesses in Europe and North America.

## Company Information
- Name: Bright Interaction
- Location: Malmö, Sweden
- Contact: contact@brightinteraction.com
- Phone: +46 76 297 80 35

## Key Pages

### Homepage
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/
Description: Main landing page showcasing our services including workflow automation, secure cloud infrastructure, API development, and compliance audits for GDPR/NIS2.

### Privacy Policy
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/privacy
Description: Our GDPR-compliant privacy policy detailing how we handle personal data, your rights, and our data protection practices.

### Terms of Service
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/terms
Description: Legal terms and conditions for using our services.

### Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/dpa
Description: Standard contractual clauses and data processing terms for clients under GDPR Article 28.

### Insights
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights
Description: Expert insights on digital infrastructure, security compliance, and workflow automation.

### GDPR & NIS2 Compliance Guide
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/gdpr-nis2-compliance-guide
Description: A practical guide for SMBs on understanding and implementing GDPR and NIS2 compliance strategies.

### Self-Hosted vs SaaS
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/self-hosted-vs-saas
Description: A practical framework for evaluating when to self-host vs use SaaS, covering control, cost, and compliance trade-offs.

### Workflow Automation Best Practices
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/workflow-automation-best-practices
Description: Best practices for designing automated workflows that are reliable, maintainable, and secure.

### Data Sovereignty in the Cloud Era
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/data-sovereignty-cloud-era
Description: Why data sovereignty matters, how cloud dependencies create risks, and strategies for regaining control of your digital assets.

### Security Configuration Essentials
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/security-configuration-essentials
Description: Essential security configurations every business should implement to protect their infrastructure from common threats.

### The Hidden Cost of Manual Processes
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/hidden-cost-of-manual-processes
Description: Calculate the true cost of manual processes and discover how much revenue you're leaving on the table. Includes interactive calculator.

### n8n vs Zapier Comparison
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/n8n-vs-zapier
Description: A detailed comparison of n8n and Zapier covering pricing, features, self-hosting capabilities, and data privacy considerations for 2026.

### Self-Hosted Alternatives to SaaS
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/self-hosted-alternatives-saas
Description: Complete guide to self-hosted alternatives for Notion, Slack, Airtable, Asana, Salesforce, and Google Drive with deployment recommendations.

### Healthcare Data Compliance
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/healthcare-data-compliance
Description: Comprehensive guide to healthcare data protection in the EU covering GDPR special category data, NIS2 requirements for health sector, and practical implementation strategies.

### Legal Tech Infrastructure
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/legal-tech-infrastructure
Description: How law firms can build technology infrastructure that protects client confidentiality, meets bar association obligations, and enables efficient practice management.

### Financial Services Security
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/financial-services-security
Description: Practical guide to cybersecurity requirements for financial services firms covering DORA, NIS2, and PSD2 obligations with implementation strategies.

### Container Security Basics
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/container-security-basics
Description: Essential practices for securing Docker and containerized applications, covering image security, runtime hardening, network isolation, and secrets management.

### SSO for Small Teams
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/sso-small-teams
Description: A practical guide to implementing Single Sign-On for small teams using self-hosted solutions like Authentik, including setup steps and security best practices.

### VPN vs Zero Trust
URL: https://brightinteraction.com/insights/vpn-vs-zero-trust
Description: How to choose between traditional VPN and Zero Trust Network Access for remote access, with comparison of security models and implementation options.

## Services Offered
1. Smart Workflow Automation - Secure systems with automatic error recovery
2. Private & Secure Cloud Infrastructure - NIS2 & GDPR compliant hosting
3. Secure System Connections & API Development - Encrypted integrations
4. Compliance & Security Audits - Automated vulnerability scanning
5. Secure Data Management - Encrypted database systems
6. Secure Business Applications - Web apps with security at the core

## Technical Stack
- Self-hosted infrastructure (no US cloud dependencies for EU clients)
- EU data residency options (Sweden, Germany)
- Docker/Kubernetes orchestration
- n8n workflow automation
- End-to-end encryption

## Target Audience
- SMBs seeking GDPR/NIS2 compliance
- Companies requiring data sovereignty
- Businesses looking to automate workflows securely
- Organizations needing self-hosted alternatives to SaaS
